name: Chocolate Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and cornstarch in a bowl; beat in eggs until smooth.
2. Mix in butter, bourbon (or vanilla), chocolate chips, and pecans until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
4. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until puffy and lightly browned. Allow to cool completely before serving.
5. Prepare whipped cream by beating together 1/2 cup heavy cream and 1 tablespoon powdered sugar until soft peaks form. Add 1 teaspoon bourbon (or vanilla) and beat until stiff peaks form.
6. Serve the cooled pie with a dollop of whipped cream.
